title: Wireless LAN Controller Architecture
subtitle: Centralized wireless management architecture in enterprise networks

controller.title: Wireless LAN Controller (WLC)
controller.desc: Central brain of the wireless network managing Access Points, WLANs, security policies and client mobility.
details: Centralized configuration and management of Access Points.
Maintains WLAN profiles and security policies.
Provides RF optimization and channel management.
Supports mobility and high availability services.

components.title: CAPWAP Control
components.desc: Manages AP registration, configuration and monitoring.

components.title: CAPWAP Data
components.desc: Carries wireless client traffic through the controller.

components.title: RF Management
components.desc: Optimizes channels, power levels and interference handling.

components.title: Mobility Services
components.desc: Supports roaming and client session continuity.

devices.title: Access Point 1
devices.desc: Provides wireless coverage and forwards traffic through CAPWAP.
details: Sends traffic to WLC using CAPWAP.
Applies RF settings received from WLC.

devices.title: Access Point 2
devices.desc: Extends wireless coverage while centrally managed by the WLC.

devices.title: Wireless Clients
devices.desc: Laptops, phones and tablets connecting through enterprise WLANs.
details: Roam between APs without session loss.

devices.title: Mobility Group
devices.desc: Supports seamless roaming between access points and controllers.
